headline: Three frontier models vs. Slack's RPC habit
commentary_md: Slack's Web API is *famously* RPC-like. This review shows why **domain modeling** matters. The panel found resources masquerading as actions, and suggested a more RESTful structure. <script>alert('xss')</script>

findings.title: UI-surface concepts exposed as side-effecting GETs
findings.disagreement: Voice A: a view has identity and lifecycle (open→push→update→close)... Voice B: modeling modal/workflow UI interactions as event-driven commands is not necessarily wrong...
